evals.prompt: I have an Android app using ZXing for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with BarcodeCapture. Here is my activity: ZxingActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: Removes all ZXing APIs and intent-based scanner launch, adds BarcodeCapture integration with matching symbologies (EAN13_UPCA, CODE128, QR), preserves ScannedBarcode data class and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: com.google.zxing import is NOT present in the output
IntentIntegrator is NOT present anywhere in the output
IntentResult is NOT present in the output
onActivityResult is NOT present (ZXing-specific flow removed)
BarcodeCapture is initialized with EAN13_UPCA, CODE128, and QR symbologies
DataCaptureView.newInstance( is used and set as the content view
ScannedBarcode data class is preserved in output
scannedBarcodes list is preserved in output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before adding) is preserved
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions com.scandit.datacapture:barcode as a Gradle dependency
Setup checklist mentions com.scandit.datacapture:core as a Gradle dependency
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
Setup checklist mentions the camera permission (CAMERA or AndroidManifest)
